Fremondain's eyes are alight with hope.

<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>In order to complete this quest, you must have learned the advanced recipes contained within <Emphasis>Master Blacksmith III</Emphasis>.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

1:
The final round of the grand tournament has come, and Fremondain informs you that Baroness Laurisse is off to a flying start. She has proven herself in the eyes of many spectators, and become a crowd favorite. However, now that she will face the final eight challengers, he fears his mistress needs every advantage. He bids you forge a high-quality adamantite winglet, of the same size and shape as the original Integrity. Do so, that the steward might present a truly fearsome weapon to the baroness.

<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>In order to complete this quest, you must have learned the advanced recipes contained within <Emphasis>Master Blacksmith III</Emphasis>.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

The final round of the grand tournament has come, and Fremondain informs you that Baroness Laurisse is off to a flying start. She has proven herself in the eyes of many spectators, and become a crowd favorite. However, now that she will face the final eight challengers, he fears his mistress needs every advantage. He bids you forge a high-quality adamantite winglet, of the same size and shape as the original Integrity. Do so, that the steward might present a truly fearsome weapon to the baroness.

<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>In order to complete this quest, you must have learned the advanced recipes contained within <Emphasis>Master Blacksmith III</Emphasis>.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

4:
Baroness Laurisse returns with sad news: she lost in the first bout to an opponent far greater in stature and girth. However, such was her ferocity and bravery that the Temple Knights took notice. Via a messenger, they offer Baroness Laurisse the position of apprentice squire, and praise her valor. The man also inquires into the origin of Integrity, and Baroness Laurisse proudly proclaims it the work of Master <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. You return the cygnine rosary, and take your payment for all the work you have done...finally. The daughter of House Jervaint says that you are doubtless meant for greater things yet, and gives her thanks. You have raised a hero with your creations, and now, the hero will carry your name to new heights.

※The next blacksmith quest will be available from Brithael once you have completed the main scenario quest “The Far Edge of Fate.”

81:
Courage, Laurisse, courage.
Thank you...my friend. I will return with good tidings.
